title: Burvy's Zombies
body:
# Burvy's Zombies
**A zombie survival mod built for the StatesMC Minecraft Server**
### Features
- Zombie Breaking Blocks
- Zombie "Piling"
- Zombie Hearing Ability
- Zombie "Investigation"
- Zombie AI Simplification
- Automatic lag management

### Disclaimer
These zombies will DESTROY your world. The best use case for this mod would be a disposable temporary world to play with friends.
On StatesMC, guns are also provided to kill the zombies. Without guns, survival may become impossible.
